title: microphyes litoralis
intro: Microphyes litoralis, also known as Sea Heath, is a flowering plant that belongs to the family Plumbaginaceae and is typically found in coastal areas. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Microphyes litoralis include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory issues, and acting as an expectorant to relieve coughs. Microphyes litoralis can be prepared as a tea or infusion, which is often used to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma.
